step_rationale: Energetic biomarker of myocardial metabolic stress and AMI mortality risk.
mechanism: Alanine elevation reflects myocardial metabolic distress and amino-acid catabolism during acute MI and recovery.

references.title: Serum Metabolomic Analysis Suggests Impairment of Myocardial Energy Production in Takotsubo Syndrome.

Differential Network Analysis Reveals Metabolic Determinants Associated with Mortality in Acute Myocardial Infarction Patients and Suggests Potential Mechanisms Underlying Different Clinical Scores Used To Predict Death.
NMR plasma metabolomics study of patients overcoming acute myocardial infarction: in the first 12 h after onset of chest pain with statistical discrimination towards metabolomic biomarkers.
Pilot study of myocardial ischemia-induced metabolomic changes in emergency department patients undergoing stress testing.
